assessor_1_raw:
## Assessment 1: Ticket Routing

Random stratified sampling = temporal leakage for evolving queue structures and team composition. Top-2 recall rewards partial credit in a single-queue routing system. Both documented flaws.

Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Assessment 2: Ticket Routing

Issue 1: Temporal leakage via random split. Issue 2: Top-2 recall misaligned with operational single-queue routing goal. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Assessment 3: Ticket Routing

Queue conventions and team structures evolve — random split creates temporal contamination. Top-2 recall allows credit when top-1 is wrong, but ticket routing routes to one queue. Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw: Ensemble Synthesis: Unanimous critique_wins. Verdict: critique_wins
